title: S + be + p.p. + to V（被動 + 不定詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞+被動(是)+ 形容詞 + 不定詞，表示主詞被期望/要求/允許/要求去做某事
主詞+被動(是)+ 過去分詞 + 不定詞，表示主詞被告知/強迫/鼓勵/允許去做某事

explanation: 此句型是被動語態與不定詞的結合，表達對主詞的期望、要求、允許或命令。核心結構為『be + 形容詞/過去分詞 + to不定詞』。常見動詞包括expect、require、allow、ask、tell、force、encourage、permit等。使用時機為強調被動方接收到的義務或允可。注意to不定詞與被動語態動詞之間有邏輯的主受關係，不可省略to。易混淆點為不定詞前的to不能刪除，且此結構與『S + be + adj + to V』(表可能性)在形式相似但意義不同。

examples.eng: Students are required to submit their assignments by Friday.
examples.chi: 學生被要求在星期五之前提交功課。

examples.eng: Children are not allowed to enter the museum without parental supervision.
examples.chi: 沒有父母監督的情況下，兒童不被允許進入博物館。

examples.eng: The employees were asked to attend the safety training session.
examples.chi: 員工被要求參加安全訓練課程。

examples.eng: All passengers are expected to fasten their seatbelts before takeoff.
examples.chi: 所有乘客被期望在起飛前繫好安全帶。

extension.tip: 判斷句型的關鍵是識別被動語態結構『be + 形容詞/過去分詞』之後必接『to + 動詞』。常見錯誤為遺漏to或誤用為『be + 形容詞 + V-ing』。若要轉換為主動語態，則為『Someone + 及物動詞 + S + to V』，邏輯關係保持不變。

examples.test: Students are expected finishing their projects on time.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤 → Students are expected to finish their projects on time. ✓ 正確（to不能省略，不定詞不能改為V-ing）

examples.test: He was told to report the incident immediately. = Someone told him to report the incident immediately.
examples.result: ✓ 正確 → 被動語態與主動語態邏輯一致，均表達命令或要求的轉達

examples.test: Children are allowed to stay up late on weekends. ≠ Children are allowed staying up late on weekends.
examples.result: ✓ 前者正確 → 被動結構後必接to不定詞，不使用V-ing形式

extension.note: 記憶口訣：『被動期望要求允，動詞前面加to字；形容詞或過去分，be動詞銜接to不定』

parts: attend the mandatory meeting next Monday.
exercises.sentence: All employees are required to attend the mandatory meeting next Monday.
exercises.translation: 所有員工被要求在下星期一參加強制會議。

parts: work more than eight hours per day according to the new labor law.
exercises.sentence: Young people are not allowed to work more than eight hours per day according to the new labor law.
exercises.translation: 根據新勞動法，年輕人不被允許每天工作超過八小時。

parts: testify in court about what he witnessed that night.
exercises.sentence: The witness was asked to testify in court about what he witnessed that night.
exercises.translation: 證人被要求在法庭上作證他那晚目睹的情況。

parts: complete the survey by providing honest and detailed answers.
exercises.sentence: Participants are expected to complete the survey by providing honest and detailed answers.
exercises.translation: 參與者被期望通過提供誠實和詳細的答案來完成調查。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 學生需要在星期五前提交作業，選擇正確的被動句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: Students are _______ to submit their assignments by Friday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「required」。此句型為 S + be + p.p. + to V，『be required to V』表示「被要求做某事」。B 項「require」是原形動詞，不符合被動語態結構。C 項「requiring」是現在分詞，無法與 be 搭配形成被動。D 項「to require」在此位置文法錯誤，to 不定詞不能直接跟在 be 後面。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 兒童被禁止獨自進入博物館，選擇正確的被動結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: Children are not _______ to enter the museum without parental supervision.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「allowed」。句型為 be + p.p. + to V，『be allowed to V』表示「被允許做某事」。A 項「allowing」是現在分詞，與 be 搭配應為進行式，不符本句意思。C 項「allow」是原形動詞，需要過去分詞形式。D 項「allows」是三單形式，無法用於被動語態結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 員工被期望達到高績效標準，選擇符合被動結構的選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: Employees are _______ to meet high performance standards in the quarterly review.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「expected to meet」。此句型要求『be + p.p. + to 不定詞』，『be expected to V』表示「被期望做某事」，to 不定詞不能省略。B 項混合了進行式與動名詞，文法錯誤。C 項「expect」是主動形式，違反被動語態結構。D 項缺少 to 不定詞中的 to，屬於關鍵詞漏置錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 運動員被激勵在國際比賽中代表國家，完成此複雜被動句型
mc_exercises.question_eng: The athletes were _______ by their coach to represent the country at the international competition, and they promised _______ their best.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C「encouraged to perform / to do」。第一空需『be encouraged to V』表被動鼓勵；第二空『promise to V』是不定詞結構。A 項第二空「doing」為動名詞，與 promise 搭配錯誤。B 項「encouraging」非過去分詞，違反被動語態規則。D 項「encouraged performing」中不定詞改為動名詞，違反 encourage to V 的正確搭配。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生被要求在課堂上準時交作業。
translation_exercises.answer: Students are required to submit their homework on time in class.
key_points: 被動語態 + 不定詞結構
hints: 句型框架：S + be + required + to V，表達對學生的要求
注意：to不定詞前的to不可省略，submit前必須保留to

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 高中生被允許參加學校舉辦的課外活動。
translation_exercises.answer: High school students are allowed to participate in extracurricular activities organized by the school.
hints: 句型框架：S + be + allowed + to V，表達對主詞的許可或允許
易混淆：allowed後的to不可刪除，否則語意會不完整；區別『be allowed』（被允許）vs『allow』（主動允許）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 運動選手被鼓勵在比賽前進行充分的體能訓練，以提升他們的表現。
translation_exercises.answer: Athletes are encouraged to undergo adequate physical training before competitions in order to improve their performance.
hints: 句型框架：S + be + encouraged + to V，表達對主詞受到的鼓勵或建議
注意：『in order to』引導的不定詞片語表示目的，與主句中『are encouraged to』的to不定詞構成並列結構，兩個to都不可省

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那些違反校規的學生被迫參加懲罰性的課程，並被告知要改正自己的行為以避免被開除。
translation_exercises.answer: Students who violate school regulations are forced to attend punitive courses and are told to correct their behavior in order to avoid being expelled.
key_points: in order to avoid being expelled
hints: 句型框架：S + be + forced/told + to V 與 S + be + told + to V，同一句中可出現多個『be + p.p. + to V』結構並列
易錯點：『avoid being expelled』中『being expelled』為動名詞的被動式，不是不定詞；『are told to correct』中to不可省，且不定詞後若接受詞（their behavior），結構仍然保持『to + V + O』的完整形式
